# Lighter.Net

> Strongly typed .NET client library for the Lighter DEX REST and WebSocket APIs. Part of the CryptoExchange.Net ecosystem, with shared API abstractions for multi-exchange code.

Lighter.Net provides typed access to Lighter public market data, account data, order management, transaction signing, WebSocket subscriptions, automatic WebSocket reconnection, client-side rate limiting, local order book support, account management helpers, and native AOT support. Current version: 1.1.0. Targets netstandard2.0, netstandard2.1, net8.0, net9.0, net10.0.

REST methods return `HttpResult<T>` / `HttpResult`, local non-I/O helpers return `CallResult<T>`, WebSocket subscriptions return `WebSocketResult<UpdateSubscription>`, WebSocket request/transaction methods return `QueryResult<T>`, and shared non-I/O symbol/cache helpers return `ExchangeCallResult<T>`. For multi-exchange code use `client.ExchangeApi.SharedClient` and call `.Discover()` before routing optional shared features.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/README.md): Overview, installation, supported features, usage examples, release notes
- [Documentation Site](https://cryptoexchange.jkorf.dev/Lighter.Net/): Client reference and CryptoExchange.Net usage patterns
- [Lighter API Docs](https://apidocs.lighter.xyz/docs/get-started): Official Lighter REST and WebSocket API reference
- [Full LLM Context](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/llms-full.txt): Detailed AI/LLM guide with code patterns, endpoint map, common mistakes, and anti-hallucination rules

## Important Concepts

- Use `LighterRestClient` for REST and `LighterSocketClient` for WebSocket. Do not generate raw `HttpClient` or manual WebSocket calls to Lighter endpoints.
- The top-level API branch is `ExchangeApi`; there are no `SpotApi`, `FuturesApi`, `UsdFuturesApi`, or `CoinFuturesApi` properties.
- Public data calls do not need credentials. Trading, account, and transaction-signing calls need `LighterCredentials(EthKey.FromPrivateKey("PRIVATE_KEY"), accountIndex, apiKeyIndex, apiSecret)`. Use `EthKey.FromPublicKey(...)` only for authenticated API-key requests that do not require layer-1 signatures.
- Lighter symbols are strings such as `ETH/USDC` for spot and `ETH` for perps.
- Transaction methods can auto-set nonces when credentials are configured. Do not manually manage nonces unless the caller explicitly needs that control.
- The library uses Lighter integrator-code support by default. Set `IntegratorFeePercentage = 0` or `null` in rest/socket options to disable the optional integrator fee.

## Examples

- [AI-friendly examples directory](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/tree/main/Examples/ai-friendly): Compact, fully runnable examples optimized for AI assistants and quick onboarding
- [Quickstart](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/01-quickstart.cs): Client setup, public market data, authenticated account calls, safe order skeleton
- [Trading](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/02-trading.cs): Leverage, margin, order placement, order lookup, cancellation, batch order shape
- [WebSocket Streams](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/03-websocket.cs): Public and authenticated subscriptions with proper teardown
- [Multi-Exchange Pattern](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/04-multi-exchange.cs): CryptoExchange.Net SharedApis capability discovery, shared ticker requests, and shared subscriptions
- [Error Handling](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/05-error-handling.cs): HttpResult, WebSocketResult, QueryResult, ExchangeCallResult, retry logic, common errors
- [Examples Repository](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/tree/main/Examples): Console, ASP.NET API, order book, and tracker examples
- [Console Example](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/Lighter.Examples.Console/Program.cs): Basic REST and socket usage
- [Order Book Example](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/Lighter.Examples.OrderBook/Program.cs): Local order book usage
- [Tracker Example](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/blob/main/Examples/Lighter.Examples.Tracker/Program.cs): User data tracker usage

## Reference

- [CryptoExchange.Net base library](https://github.com/JKorf/CryptoExchange.Net): Base abstractions used by Lighter.Net and other exchange libraries
- [CryptoClients.Net](https://github.com/JKorf/CryptoClients.Net): Bundle package providing unified access to many exchange libraries
- [NuGet Package](https://www.nuget.org/packages/JKorf.Lighter.Net): Latest stable release on NuGet

## Optional

- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/MSpeEtSY8t): Maintainer-supported Discord for questions and discussion
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/JKorf/Lighter.Net/issues): Bug reports and feature requests
- [GitHub Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/JKorf): Support the maintainer
